steps.assistant_text: Cross-module masked-twin sweep grouped gl_func_00074C04 with the matched kernel func_80009D10 (kernel_037) in a strict 84-insn signature cluster; reloc-masked word comparison showed 0 non-reloc diffs. Prior NM-wrap was an in-context approximation (44/84 etc.); the verbatim kernel twin is byte-exact.
